title: Yemeni Sign Language
summary: Yemeni Sign Language (Arabic: لغة الإشارة اليمنية, romanized: Lughat al-Ishārah al-Yamanīyah) is the (or a) deaf sign language of Yemen. It belongs to the Arab sign-language family (Hendriks 2008). It is not clear how close are the sign languages of the two former Yemeni states.
text: Yemeni Sign Language (Arabic: لغة الإشارة اليمنية, romanized: Lughat al-Ishārah al-Yamanīyah) is the (or a) deaf sign language of Yemen. It belongs to the Arab sign-language family (Hendriks 2008). It is not clear how close are the sign languages of the two former Yemeni states.
